evals.name: create-coaching-default
evals.prompt: We need to add a 'Floor Plan Favorites' feature to the floor plan tool. Brokers can favorite frequently-used floor plans and call them directly next time. Currently they have to search again each time, averaging 1-2 minutes. Please help me write a PRD.
evals.expected_output: Default to coaching mode, one question at a time, do not generate full PRD directly. First response should ask only one question (e.g., about problem description), no batch questioning.

assertions.name: Identifies create intent
assertions.description: Output explicitly identifies create intent

assertions.name: Enters coaching mode
assertions.description: Output explicitly mentions coaching mode or one question at a time

assertions.name: First round asks only one question
assertions.description: First response contains only one main guiding question

assertions.name: Does not generate full PRD
assertions.description: Output does not contain complete 12-chapter PRD structure

assertions.name: Metadata pre-filled
assertions.description: Output contains Metadata table with version v1.0.0

assertions.name: Flowchart includes failure/timeout branches
assertions.description: Flowchart contains failure/timeout branches

evals.name: create-fast-command
evals.prompt: We need to add a 'Floor Plan Favorites' feature to the floor plan tool. Brokers can favorite frequently-used floor plans and call them directly next time. Currently they have to search again each time, averaging 1-2 minutes. Use fast mode to generate PRD directly.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes fast command, generates complete PRD (with 12-chapter skeleton), appends reverse questions and review record at the end.

assertions.name: Recognizes fast command
assertions.description: Output explicitly identifies fast mode command

assertions.name: Generates complete PRD
assertions.description: Output contains complete 12-chapter PRD structure

assertions.name: Contains user stories chapter
assertions.description: Output contains user stories chapter

assertions.name: Contains flowchart
assertions.description: Output contains mermaid flowchart code

assertions.name: Contains feature list
assertions.description: Output contains F-x.x numbered feature list

assertions.name: Contains review record
assertions.description: Output contains review record (First Principles Validation) at the end

assertions.name: Contains reverse questions
assertions.description: Output contains [ASSUMPTION] tags or reverse questions

assertions.name: Flowchart includes failure/timeout branches
assertions.description: Flowchart contains failure/timeout branches

evals.name: create-coaching-command
evals.prompt: I want to create a PRD, guide me using coaching mode.
evals.expected_output: Enters coaching mode, one question at a time, first round asks only one question.

assertions.name: Recognizes coaching command
assertions.description: Output explicitly identifies coaching mode command

assertions.name: First round asks only one question
assertions.description: First response contains only one main guiding question

assertions.name: Does not generate full PRD
assertions.description: Output does not contain complete 12-chapter PRD structure

evals.name: update-with-review
evals.prompt: Based on the existing PRD, add a 'Share favorites with team members' feature, supporting permission control (read/edit).
evals.expected_output: 1) Auto-append changelog entry (version +0.1.0); 2) Generate 'Key Update Notes' paragraph; 3) New F-x.x numbering continues; 4) Chapter 6/7 synced; 5) PRD ends with review record (First Principles + Logical Completeness + Boundary Risk)

assertions.name: Identifies update intent
assertions.description: Output explicitly identifies update intent

assertions.name: Version upgrade
assertions.description: Version upgraded from v1.0.0 to v1.1.0 or higher

assertions.name: Contains changelog
assertions.description: Output contains changelog table or section

assertions.name: Contains Key Update Notes
assertions.description: Output contains 'Key Update Notes' paragraph

assertions.name: New feature numbering continues
assertions.description: New feature numbering continues from existing F-x.x numbering

assertions.name: Contains review record
assertions.description: Output contains review record (First Principles Validation)

assertions.name: Contains change impact analysis
assertions.description: Output contains change impact analysis or traceability

assertions.name: Flowchart includes failure/timeout branches
assertions.description: Flowchart contains failure/timeout branches

evals.name: validate-existing
evals.prompt: Please validate this PRD against the standard.
evals.expected_output: Output graded validation report (Critical/Warning/Info): structural completeness, US↔F-x.x bidirectional traceability, Chapter 6↔7 1:1 correspondence, tracking↔success metric traceability, acceptance criteria testability, flowchart standards, glossary coverage, [ASSUMPTION] index, external dependency schedule status. Each issue includes chapter location + fix suggestion.

assertions.name: Identifies validate intent
assertions.description: Output explicitly identifies validate intent

assertions.name: Contains Critical level issues
assertions.description: Output contains Critical level issue category

assertions.name: Contains Warning level issues
assertions.description: Output contains Warning level issue category

assertions.name: Contains Info level issues
assertions.description: Output contains Info level issue category

assertions.name: Contains user story traceability check
assertions.description: Output contains user story to feature list traceability check

assertions.name: Contains acceptance criteria check
assertions.description: Output contains acceptance criteria testability check

assertions.name: Contains overall score
assertions.description: Output contains overall score or rating
